# Strata Design System

> React 19 + TypeScript 5.9 + Tailwind CSS v4.2 + Radix UI headless design system.
> 57 components across 4 categories (primitives, layout, disclosure, feedback).
> 3-layer OKLch design tokens: primitives → semantic → component. Dark/light theme.

## Getting Started

- [README](README.md): Installation, quick start, and project overview
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): AI development conventions and skill commands

## Design Tokens

- [Layer 1: Primitives](src/tokens/layer1-primitive.css): OKLch color scales, spacing, typography, radius. Prefix `--sp-*`
- [Layer 2: Semantic](src/tokens/layer2-semantic.css): Intent-based aliases (`--surface-*`, `--fg-*`, `--border-*`, `--color-*`)
- [Layer 3: Component](src/tokens/layer3-component.css): Component-scoped overrides (`--btn-*`, `--dialog-*`, `--menu-*`)

## Primitives (34)

- [AspectRatio](src/components/primitives/AspectRatio/AspectRatio.md): Maintains a fixed width-to-height ratio for its child content.
- [Avatar](src/components/primitives/Avatar/Avatar.md): Displays a user image or initials fallback in a circular badge.
- [AvatarGroup](src/components/primitives/AvatarGroup/AvatarGroup.md): Stacks multiple Avatar components with overlap and an optional overflow counter.
- [Badge](src/components/primitives/Badge/Badge.md): Renders a small inline label for status, category, or count.
- [Breadcrumb](src/components/primitives/Breadcrumb/Breadcrumb.md): Renders a navigational breadcrumb trail with links, separators, and a current page indicator.
- [Button](src/components/primitives/Button/Button.md): Primary interactive element for triggering actions, with variant styling and loading state.
- [Card](src/components/primitives/Card/Card.md): Container component for grouping related content with optional header and footer sections.
- [Checkbox](src/components/primitives/Checkbox/Checkbox.md): Binary toggle input built on Radix Checkbox with custom styling and check indicator.
- [Code](src/components/primitives/Code/Code.md): Inline code snippet with monospace font and subtle background.
- [DataList](src/components/primitives/DataList/DataList.md): Displays key-value pairs in a structured two-column definition list layout.
- [Divider](src/components/primitives/Divider/Divider.md): Visual separator line between content sections, horizontal or vertical.
- [FormField](src/components/primitives/FormField/FormField.md): Wraps a form control with a label, optional description, and error message.
- [Heading](src/components/primitives/Heading/Heading.md): Semantic heading element (h1-h6) with level-based typography presets.
- [Icon](src/components/primitives/Icon/Icon.md): Base SVG icon wrapper and factory for 61 named icon components.
- [Input](src/components/primitives/Input/Input.md): Text input field with size variants, error state, and optional prefix/suffix adornments via InputGroup.
- [Kbd](src/components/primitives/Kbd/Kbd.md): Renders a keyboard shortcut key in a styled inline badge.
- [Label](src/components/primitives/Label/Label.md): Accessible form label built on Radix Label with peer-disabled styling.
- [Pagination](src/components/primitives/Pagination/Pagination.md): Compound navigation component for paging through content.
- [ProgressBar](src/components/primitives/ProgressBar/ProgressBar.md): Displays a horizontal bar indicating progress toward completion.
- [RadioGroup](src/components/primitives/RadioGroup/RadioGroup.md): Compound radio button group for single-option selection.
- [ScrollArea](src/components/primitives/ScrollArea/ScrollArea.md): Compound scrollable container with custom-styled scrollbars.
- [Select](src/components/primitives/Select/Select.md): Compound dropdown select for choosing a single value from a list.
- [Separator](src/components/primitives/Separator/Separator.md): Visual divider between content sections, horizontal or vertical.
- [Slider](src/components/primitives/Slider/Slider.md): Range input for selecting numeric values along a track.
- [Spinner](src/components/primitives/Spinner/Spinner.md): Animated loading indicator using an SVG spinner.
- [StatusDot](src/components/primitives/StatusDot/StatusDot.md): Small colored circle indicating presence or availability status.
- [Switch](src/components/primitives/Switch/Switch.md): Toggle switch for binary on/off states.
- [Table](src/components/primitives/Table/Table.md): Compound HTML table with consistent styling for data display.
- [Text](src/components/primitives/Text/Text.md): Polymorphic typography component for rendering text with consistent size, weight, and color.
- [Textarea](src/components/primitives/Textarea/Textarea.md): Multi-line text input field with size and error variants.
- [ToggleGroup](src/components/primitives/ToggleGroup/ToggleGroup.md): Compound toggle button group for selecting one or multiple options.
- [Toolbar](src/components/primitives/Toolbar/Toolbar.md): Compound horizontal toolbar for grouping actions and toggles.
- [Truncate](src/components/primitives/Truncate/Truncate.md): Clamps text overflow to a specified number of lines with ellipsis.
- [VisuallyHidden](src/components/primitives/VisuallyHidden/VisuallyHidden.md): Hides content visually while keeping it accessible to screen readers.

## Layout (5)

- [AppShell](src/components/layout/AppShell/AppShell.md): Full-viewport flex container that frames the entire application layout.
- [Container](src/components/layout/Container/Container.md): Centered, max-width-constrained content wrapper with horizontal padding.
- [Sidebar](src/components/layout/Sidebar/Sidebar.md): Collapsible vertical navigation panel with grouped sections and interactive items.
- [Stack](src/components/layout/Stack/Stack.md): Flexbox layout primitive for arranging children in a row or column with controlled spacing and alignment.
- [TopBar](src/components/layout/TopBar/TopBar.md): Fixed-height horizontal header bar for application-level navigation and actions.

## Disclosure (13)

- [Accordion](src/components/disclosure/Accordion/Accordion.md): Vertically stacked collapsible sections powered by Radix Accordion primitive.
- [AlertDialog](src/components/disclosure/AlertDialog/AlertDialog.md): Modal confirmation dialog for destructive or irreversible actions, with required user acknowledgment.
- [Collapsible](src/components/disclosure/Collapsible/Collapsible.md): Simple show/hide toggle container powered by Radix Collapsible primitive.
- [ContextMenu](src/components/disclosure/ContextMenu/ContextMenu.md): Right-click context menu with items, labels, and separators, using shared menu token system.
- [Dialog](src/components/disclosure/Dialog/Dialog.md): General-purpose modal dialog with structured header, body, and footer sections.
- [DropdownMenu](src/components/disclosure/DropdownMenu/DropdownMenu.md): Click-triggered dropdown menu with items, labels, and separators, using shared menu token system.
- [HoverCard](src/components/disclosure/HoverCard/HoverCard.md): Hover-triggered floating card for previewing content without clicking.
- [Menubar](src/components/disclosure/Menubar/Menubar.md): Horizontal menu bar with multiple dropdown menus, suitable for application-level menus.
- [NavigationMenu](src/components/disclosure/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenu.md): Site-level navigation with trigger-activated content panels and link items.
- [Popover](src/components/disclosure/Popover/Popover.md): Click-triggered floating panel for forms, filters, or supplementary content.
- [Sheet](src/components/disclosure/Sheet/Sheet.md): Slide-out panel (drawer) anchored to any viewport edge, built on Radix Dialog.
- [Tabs](src/components/disclosure/Tabs/Tabs.md): Tabbed interface for switching between content panels within the same context.
- [Tooltip](src/components/disclosure/Tooltip/Tooltip.md): Hover-triggered informational label that appears near the target element.

## Feedback (5)

- [Alert](src/components/feedback/Alert/Alert.md): Inline status message with variant-driven severity and optional dismiss action.
- [Callout](src/components/feedback/Callout/Callout.md): Contextual highlight block with optional icon, title, and body content.
- [EmptyState](src/components/feedback/EmptyState/EmptyState.md): Centered placeholder for empty data views with icon, message, and call-to-action slot.
- [Skeleton](src/components/feedback/Skeleton/Skeleton.md): Animated loading placeholder with shape variants for content shimmer effects.
- [Toast](src/components/feedback/Toast/Toast.md): Transient notification system built on Radix Toast primitive with timed auto-dismiss.

## Demo Applications (11)

- [character-chat](src/demos/character-chat/): Reference implementation
- [discord](src/demos/discord/): Reference implementation
- [figma](src/demos/figma/): Reference implementation
- [github](src/demos/github/): Reference implementation
- [linear](src/demos/linear/): Reference implementation
- [notion](src/demos/notion/): Reference implementation
- [slack](src/demos/slack/): Reference implementation
- [spotify](src/demos/spotify/): Reference implementation
- [trello](src/demos/trello/): Reference implementation
- [twitter](src/demos/twitter/): Reference implementation
- [vscode](src/demos/vscode/): Reference implementation

## Utilities

- [cn()](src/lib/utils.ts): Class merging utility using clsx + tailwind-merge
